title: Sleep-control field query surface
goal: Expose a narrow optional kernel-bootstrap query for live sleep-control field bits so downstream consumers do not mask raw sleep-control bytes themselves.
next_actions: Add the public sleep-control field query API and internal FADT-backed helper.
Emit a deterministic host-smoke marker for the raw live field value.
Extend the BSP surface test, manifest marker, and platform docs.
acceptance: The host smoke proves the field query value and readiness marker.
The BSP surface test requires the API, implementation marker, and manifest marker.
Platform docs describe the new narrow consumer surface.
